title: Ironpowder
description: Adds guns, equipment, armor and new gameplay to Vanilla Minecraft
body:
❗When applying the pack Mulitplayer❗Minecraft's damage types are not instantly recognized, simple fix; restart server after enabling pack.

This is ironpowder, a pack mainly for Vanilla Minecraft introducing a fair bit of content and new gameplay with the guns, equipment, and armors within the pack.

If you find this; Version 7 is coming along, and will be a huge upgrade
